message: ci: add continue-on-error to artifact upload steps
test(e2e): skip feedback-bubble flow until Animated.View visibility resolved
fix(feedback): fade backdrop instead of sliding + fix E2E test scroll
fix(e2e): move feedback-sheet testID from Modal to inner Pressable
fix(e2e): wait for feedback sheet Modal slide animation before asserting
fix(ci): include native modules in EAS build + extend production for Android
refactor: introduce AppConfig build-profile abstraction and fix unit tests
fix: suppress curve voice guidance in roundabouts and add green health indicator
fix: reduce voice guidance announcement distances for tighter timing
feat: persist Heimdall feature gate overrides with defaults enabled
fix: resolve Maestro E2E test failures
fix: disable Sentry source map upload in E2E builds
fix: generate SDK stat cache in CI before xcodebuild runs
fix: native MKOverlayLevel separation to eliminate polyline z-fighting
fix: add e2e-simulator profile to app/eas.json (correct location)
fix: native iOS audio session cycling for reliable duck/unduck toggle
refactor: DRY up navigation event and voice guidance changes
refactor: extract HOUR_THRESHOLD_MIN constant, add prefetch debug log
refactor: generalize freeride waypoint handling, DRY up reroute logic
fix: TripSummaryModal layout + add traveled route dev toggle
ci: clean conflicting distribution certs from login keychain before build
ci: pin DEVELOPER_DIR to Xcode 26.0.1 for local builds
fix: align road name marginLeft with mockup (60→50px)
fix: redesign TurnInstruction and landscape CurveBeacon layout
fix: prevent ScrollView from stealing volume slider touch
fix: turn action text wrapping, CurveBeacon landscape alignment and sizing
refactor: simplify audio ducking internals and debounce settings save
fix: three-phase polyline transition to eliminate z-fighting flicker
fix: re-center button not animating camera after skip optimization
refactor: simplify battery optimizations after review
fix: StopsCard single-stop remove button, sleeker expanded modal
fix: restore turn instruction width, StopsCard modal overlay, curve wrap
feat: keep screen awake during navigation even in low power mode
fix: re-authenticate Spotify when player actions fail to communicate
refactor: compact StopsCard and landscape side-by-side curve widget
feat: generalize fuel-station into waypoint system with multi-stop route builder
refactor: remove dead Heimdall hooks, deduplicate userLocationRef
fix: unify Heimdall into single shared WebSocket connection
fix: volume slider flicker when dragging knob directly
ci: clean up IPA files after local build
fix: freeride button crash from stale closure + heading fallback
fix: auto-login after account creation by using onIdTokenChanged
Initiate
fix: dynamic pager height so widget page is not clipped
fix: write registerDeviceUrl into ad-hoc info.json during CI builds
fix: unify Spotify widget to column layout in both orientations
fix: align landscape clock with turn instruction panel
fix: replace remaining StatusBar style="auto" with ThemedStatusBar
fix: immediately stop all audio when mute button is pressed
refactor: untangle navigation provider logic

refactor: add navigation context type definitions (Step 3)
